findings.claim_text: Kimi K3 (2.8T total parameters) launched July 16, 2026 and topped LMArena's Frontend Code leaderboard the same day at 1679 points — on just 1,757 votes, the fewest of any top-10 model, tagged "Preliminary."

On execution-graded benchmarks (SWE-bench Verified, LiveCodeBench), Kimi K3 has zero independently-verified scores as of launch; Moonshot's own self-reported numbers admit it still trails Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol.

The win lands the same week Moonshot is reportedly seeking a $31.5B valuation (up from $20B two months earlier), while its consumer app's monthly active users have fallen roughly 57% since early 2025.
findings.contradicting_quote: Moonshot AI recently closed a funding round at a $20 billion valuation, with the pre-money valuation for this round reaching $31.5 billion.
